title: Create Progress Faster!
description:
Create Progress Faster, Create Mod Addon

Placing This In The Summary But I Made This Mod Using Mcreator For Generating The Tough Stuff But Have Since Learned To Use It Better So The Update Is Delayed While I Optimize The Mod Further
body:
-
Have You Ever Been Playing Create Mod And Have Gone,

"The Press Is So Expensive For Just Wanting To Make A Few Encased Fans"
-
Introducing The Handy Hammer

By Taking Ingots And Placing Them In Your Inventory Crafting Slot(Or A Crafting Table) And If You Put The Hammer In There As Well, Then By Golly Gee You Have Sheets

-

What About Belts They Are Relatively Easy To Find
If You Are Near An Ocean Using Kelp Is Slightly Irritating

Using The Handy Hammer Sewing Kit (Not Currently An Item So Its Just The Hammer For Now)

Place Your Hammer Inside A Crafting Gui In The Middle Slot, Surround It With Wool Of Your Choice And Make "Dense Woolen Fabric" 

Inspired By The Real World Alternative WOOL Conveyor Belts Mostly Used In Food Production
Like Breads And Stuff

You Can Take That Dense Woolen Fabric Craft 4 Of It Together And Make A Belt Its A Little Tedious But It's A Easier Alternative To Searching For Kelp

To Do List And Future Plans
-
More Helpful Tools Besides Handy Hammer

Durability For Handy Hammer

Portable Kiln For Early Ore Duplication

Portable Mortar And Pestle For Creating Some Dusts

Super Sledge Hammer A Combat Focused Hammer To Make Early Game To Keep Pesky Mobs 
Out Of Your Buisness!

And Some More Work In Progress Content

-
Advancements
-
Better Item Textures  (This Will Just Take Time)
-
Music Disc's  (Not A Musician)
-
A Youtube Trailer For The Mod

For The Videos I Really Just Need To Make A New Channel
Ive Been Experimenting With Artwork And Trailer Schemes As Well As
Future Plan Teasers, Whenever This Is Done I Will Probably Overhaul This Description
And Should Have A Discord Made For Progress Updates
